headline: Beautiful UI for developers who can't design
image_keyword: developer creating beautiful UI without design skills

headline: 200+ components. Free. Copy and paste.
body: Aceternity UI offers 200+ free copy-paste React and Next.js components built with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion. Every component ships with smooth animations and production-ready code. You do not need a design degree.

headline: $200-500 per seat becomes $0
body: A typical UI component library costs $200-500 per developer seat annually. Aceternity UI is completely free and open source. For a team of 10 developers, that is $2,000-5,000 saved per year on component licenses alone.

headline: Professional animations, no motion designer required
body: The components come with Framer Motion animations pre-configured. Adding smooth, professional transitions to your app no longer requires a dedicated motion designer or 40 hours of CSS animation work.

headline: 180,000+ developers in production
body: Over 180,000 developers use Aceternity UI in production. The library covers navigation patterns, data grids, complex card layouts, and hero sections. If your app needs it, the component probably exists.

headline: A free design system, maintained by the community
body: The real value is not the components themselves. It is the design system they represent. Consistent spacing, typography, color, and motion patterns without hiring a design systems team to build and maintain them.

headline: Copy. Paste. Ship. Follow for more developer tools.
image_keyword: CTA copy paste ship developer tools
